PRODUCT: dfrA5 is an integron-encoded dihydrofolate reductase found in Vibrio cholerae.
EreA2 is an integron-encoded erythromycin esterase that hydrolyses the drug's lactone ring. EreA2 is found in Providencia stuartii.
cmlA9 is a Major Facilitator Superfamily efflux gene that is found in Salmonella enterica.
Bicyclomycin resistance protein OS=Escherichia coli (strain K12) GN=bcr PE=1 SV=4
